title: Battery State of Charge Low
description: Battery state of charge has fallen below 20%. Consider reducing non-essential loads or increasing grid charging.

title: Battery Critical Level
description: Battery state of charge has fallen below 10%. Backup power availability is significantly reduced.

title: High Grid Import Detected
description: Grid import has exceeded 250 kW for more than 30 minutes, indicating increased operational demand.

title: Solar Production Below Expected
description: Current solar generation is significantly below forecasted levels for the time of day.

title: Solar Inverter Offline
description: One or more solar inverters are not reporting data and may be offline.

title: Grid Export Active
description: Excess solar generation is currently being exported to the grid.

title: Peak Demand Threshold Reached
description: Facility demand has exceeded the configured peak demand threshold and may incur additional utility charges.

title: Energy Consumption Normal
description: Facility energy consumption is operating within expected parameters.

title: Communication Loss Detected
description: A field device has not reported telemetry data for more than 15 minutes.

title: Battery Charging Cycle Started
description: Battery energy storage system has entered a scheduled charging cycle.
